title: Get Your Ass to Mars
headline: Because Mars Isn't Going to Colonize Itself
caption:
Put on this shirt and channel your inner Arnold. It's time to answer the call... or get your ass to Mars. 
Grab it here: https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/get+your+ass+to+mars?idea=5d89cc1fb4b8c76e39170868 Reply if you get the reference.

#TotalRecall #Schwarzenegger
alt_text: A humorous take on a classic movie line, featuring the phrase 'Get Your Ass to Mars' on a t-shirt.

title: Guns Don't Kill People
headline: Guns Don't Kill People—But Decisions Sure Do
caption:
Let's face it: it’s not the gun that pulls the trigger, it’s the delightful cocktail of poor choices and a lack of impulse control. Wear this shirt to take the moral high ground while schadenfreude-ing your way through conversation. 
Get yours here: https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/guns+don't+kill+people?idea=5d89cbe020517626420dadda Reply if you get the reference.

#DarkHumor #PoliticalSatire
alt_text: Guns Don't Kill People t-shirt design

title: I Can't Feel My Perineum
headline: When Your Ride Leaves You... Numb
caption:
Because nothing says 'I love cycling' like questioning your anatomy. Grab this shirt and wear your discomfort like a badge of honor. It’s either that or sit in silence at the next group ride. 
👉 https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/i+can't+feel+my+perineum?idea=5d89cc11b4b8c76e39170242 Reply if you get the reference.

#CyclingHumor #BikeLife
alt_text: A humorous graphic t-shirt that reads 'I Can't Feel My Perineum' with a cyclist graphic.
